message:
feat(desktop_notify): add generic notify_message method

Add DesktopNotifier::notify_message() for sending custom notifications:

- Takes title, body, and urgency parameters
- Reuses existing notification backend infrastructure
- Handles disabled state gracefully
- Returns DesktopDeliveryResult with success/error details

This enables non-workflow notification use cases like backup completion
alerts and manual status broadcasts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
